variants: Lila Tsering graduated from Eclipse Conservatory, where she developed her literary skills, paving the way for her success as a writer published by Maple & Quill Books. She currently works at Lantern Quark Robotics, where she integrates her creativity and technical knowledge. Lila is also dedicated to community service through her role as Foster Relations at Maplevale Home, helping to support those in need. In her daily interactions, she primarily uses the Occitan dialect, reflecting her cultural background and commitment to preserving regional languages.
